zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Denne於1278年出生在英國肯特金斯頓時，他的父親Walter de Denne II34歲，母親Isabell31歲。他於大約1327年與Elizabeth de Gatton在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年在英國英格蘭肯特金斯頓享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Denne于1278年出生在英国肯特金斯頓时，他的父亲Walter de Denne II34岁，母亲Isabell31岁。他于大约1327年与Elizabeth de Gatton在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1346年在英国英格兰肯特金斯頓享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏。

nameMeanings.name: Denne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (mainly northern) and Walloon: probably a variant of Dhenne, a patronymic, with fused preposition d(e) ‘of’, from Henne, a pet form of the personal names French Henri, Flemish Hendrik (see Henry 1). Alternatively, perhaps a variant of Daine, the feminine form of Dain .

variants.name: Denn
meanings: English (Kent): variant of Denne , a habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in Kent and Sussex with names derived from Middle English den ‘woodland swine-pasture’ (Old English denn), such as Denne Manor in Chilham, Denne Hill in Kingston, and Denne Court in Woodnesborough (Kent); Denne Park in Horsham, Denne in Warnham, and Dann's Farm in Willingdon (Sussex).
English: possibly from a pet form of   Denis  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Denne was born in 1278, in Kingston, Kent, England, his father, Walter de Denne II, was 34 and his mother, Isabell, was 31. He married Elizabeth de Gatton about 1327, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1346, in Kingston, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Denne est né en 1278, à Kingston, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Denne II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Isabell, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Gatton environ 1327, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1346, à Kingston, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Denne 1278 in Kingston, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Denne II 34 und seine Mutter Isabell 31. Er hat um 1327 in Kent, England Elizabeth de Gatton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1346 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Kingston, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Denne è nato il nel 1278 nel Kingston, Kent, England, il suo padre, Walter de Denne II, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Isabell, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Gatton circa 1327, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1346, nel Kingston, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Denneが1278年にイギリスケントキングストンで生まれた時，父Walter de Denne IIは34歳，母Isabellは31歳であった。約1327年にイギリスケントでElizabeth de Gattonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年にイギリスイギリスケントキングストンで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Denne(이)가 1278년 영국 켄트 킨그스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Denne II(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1327년 영국 켄트에서 Elizabeth de Gatton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 킨그스턴에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Denne nasceu em 1278, em Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Denne II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Isabell, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Gatton aproximadamente 1327, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1346, em Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Denne родился в 1278 г. в местности кингстон, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Denne II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Isabell, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Gatton около 1327 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1346 г. в местности кингстон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Denne nació en 1278, en Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Denne II, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Isabell, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Gatton aproximadamente 1327, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1346, en Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
